projects.title: Gloomhunt
projects.summary: Browser-based survival shooter running on a custom game engine with deterministic replay, server-side score verification, and a double-entry financial ledger for real-money prize challenges. 50,000+ lines of application code, 230 automated tests. Node.js, PostgreSQL.

projects.title: Kevvlar
projects.summary: Project management SaaS with real-time collaboration via WebSockets, Stripe billing, Twilio video conferencing, and a unified permissions model. React, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis. ~150 users, live since 2021.

projects.title: Street Keeper
projects.summary: Strava-integrated running app that tracks street-level coverage using a custom GPS-to-street matching engine built on PostGIS spatial queries. Webhook pipeline for real-time activity ingestion, background job processing via pg-boss, on-demand city synchronisation with three-layer deduplication, and a clustering-based route suggestion engine. React, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL.

projects.title: Robot Dojo
projects.summary: Full-stack web application with a custom-built database management system, a text processing engine for natural-language command parsing, and a global state architecture. Node.js, Express, REST API, deployed to production.
